name: bloating
title: best herbal teas for bloating
description: Cuminum cyminum tea contains various bioactive constituents such as cuminaldehyde, limonene, and borneol that help to treat bloating ailments. These constituents possess anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and carminative properties that aid in reducing bloating and discomfort. To make Cuminum cyminum tea, boil 1 teaspoon of dried seeds in 1 cup of water for 5-7 minutes, then strain and let it cool.
